title: SimpleMovement
body:
A small Mod adding More dramatic movement

Crouch + look at a wall within 1 block, Climbing, No cooldown

Crouch + Have a block above your head, Climbing the thing above you (Brachiation), No cooldown

C, Dashing, dashing 0.1s before hitting the ground negates fall damage, 2 second cooldown

Crouch + R, long jump Kind of self explanatory, 4.5-5.5 Second cooldown
